text.title: Shift Log — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the per-file shape, frontmatter fields, and archive path. Lint script consumes both.

field.name: sections
field.must_contain: Carry-over from previous shift,Active investigations,Watch items,Deferred work,Customer escalations,End-of-shift handover

field.name: checkpoints
field.requirement: each section updated at least once at corresponding checkpoint

forbidden.pattern: frontmatter.previous_shift_acknowledged == false AND shift is not the first in the system
log body contains blame markers (named-person + negative-action pattern)
missing any of the five required sections
log not committed to the repository within 30 minutes of shift end

allowed-transformations.transformation: Append-only updates within a shift; do not rewrite earlier sections.
Link incident-runbook references inline; do not duplicate runbook content in the shift log.
Redact customer-PII in customer escalation entries; refer by ticket ID, not name + email.

list.item: Three checkpoints visibly updated (start ack, mid update, end handover)
Committed to the repo within 30 min of shift end
